content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "The Maths Lecture". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/507/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of students. Then, there are n lines, each containing a string s and an integer k, separated by a space.
content.outputFormat: The output should be a single integer, which is the maximum number of students that can attend the lecture.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the students based on their arrival time and then select the students with the earliest arrival time until the lecture starts.
